title: Intense Smoky Filipino Bacon Onigiri
description: A solo dinner dish featuring crispy Filipino bacon and Japanese nigiri shaping, this earthy and shattering meal is perfect for a quiet evening, and is halal-friendly by using halal-certified bacon or bacon alternative.
instructions: Cook the Japanese short grain rice according to package instructions and let it cool.
Cut the halal bacon into small pieces and cook in a pan over medium heat until crispy.
Add smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper to the bacon and stir to combine.
Add the chopped green onions to the bacon mixture and stir to combine.
Add the cooked and cooled Japanese short grain rice to the bacon mixture and stir to combine.
Add the sesame oil and northern filipino patis to the rice mixture and stir to combine.
Using wet hands, shape the rice mixture into small triangular shapes, similar to nigiri.
Serve the Intense Smoky Filipino Bacon Onigiri immediately and enjoy.
Optional: garnish with additional chopped green onions and serve with a side of steamed vegetables.
